security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8080 ws://localhost:8080 https://relay.example.com wss://relay.example.com; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
